creator: a5b@rt.mipt.ru
text:
Thanks!!

This solves similar problems on GA-G33-DS3R motherboard with Core Duo  
E8200 and  PS/2 mouse. Just disabling USB Mouse Support in Award BIOS  
(version F6).

There are also bugs kern/123735, kern/127486 with the same panic error.

There is a link to the problem code https://kerneltrap.org/mailarchive/freebsd-bugs/2008/5/19/1873024/thread
   /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/mp_machdep.c:774
